attributes.action: Change Erskine May to make the PM and ministers answer questions honestly.
attributes.additional_details: This change would make Prime Minister’s Questions and other question‑time sessions more meaningful, force the Prime Minister and ministers to stop hiding behind spin, and hold the government to account in front of the public.
attributes.background: To amend Erskine May so that MP's and especially the PM bound to answer questions honestly. Kier Starmer has repeatedly dodged questions in the House of Commons giving off topic answers to questions that the public consider to be of the upmost importance, undermining trust in democracy.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Introduce standards for answers to PMQs to be enforced by the Speaker
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762566
